description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a matte black finish and a streamlined, tactical design. It features a single, elongated barrel with a prominent Picatinny rail running along the top, suitable for mounting optics or accessories. The grip is shaped ergonomically, resembling a pistol grip, and the trigger is housed within a rounded guard. The receiver and barrel are integrated into a single, continuous form, with no visible stock extending from the rear. The muzzle is circular and the overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable firearm, likely intended for close-quarters use. The surface appears to be made primarily of metal with some polymer components, giving it a robust yet utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a single barrel, Picatinny rail, and pistol grip, designed for tactical use. The design is streamlined and modern, with no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the Picatinny rail, pistol grip, and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, the width of the barrel, and the alignment of the rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the length and ribbing of the Picatinny rail and the compactness of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, uninterrupted profile and a Picatinny rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
